sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32096" key="e(kkaieikosa/edron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑκκαιεικοσάεδρον</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n32096.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">solid with twenty-six surfaces,</tr_> Papp.in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2p.536H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
